name: DeckView
author: ernes
description: Shrinks cards in deck-like views (deck view, draw/discard/exhaust piles, card library, and deck card-select screens) so more fit on screen and the whole deck is easier to read at a glance. Hover still pops a card to full size. Choose-a-card, card-reward, unlock, shop, and card-bundle screens are left at normal size. Built and tested for Slay the Spire 2 v0.108.0; on other versions it patches only if the game internals still match and otherwise leaves the UI vanilla (it never crashes the game).
